name: Sergio Eraso
title: PhD Student in Physics, MIT
bio: Sergio is a physicist working on nonequilibrium statistical physics and biophysics. He builds models, simulations, and tools to understand how simple local rules produce predictable large-scale behavior in complex systems.

name: Mehran Kardar
title: Francis Friedman Professor of Physics, MIT
bio: Professor Kardar is a theoretical physicist interested in a wide range of phenomena. He is particularly known for the Kardar–Parisi–Zhang (KPZ) equation in theoretical physics, which has been named after him and his two coauthors: the Nobel Prize laureate Giorgio Parisi, and Yi-Cheng Zhang.
